name: 天眼查
description: Query comprehensive enterprise data via Tianyancha MCP. Supports company registration info, shareholder structure, risk monitoring, intellectual property, executive teams, financial data, and more — complete business intelligence through natural language.
description_zh: 通过天眼查 MCP 查询多维度企业数据。支持工商登记、股东结构、司法风险、知识产权、董监高、经营数据等 160+ 项企业数据能力，用自然语言完成企业尽调与商业情报分析。
description_en: Query comprehensive enterprise data via Tianyancha MCP. Supports company registration info, shareholder structure, risk monitoring, intellectual property, executive teams, financial data, and more — complete business intelligence through natural language.
examples_zh: 查一下北京金堤科技有限公司的基本工商信息
帮我查下比亚迪股份有限公司的股东结构
查询腾讯科技（深圳）有限公司的知识产权信息
看看阿里巴巴集团有没有司法风险
examples_en: Look up the basic registration info of Beijing Jindi Technology Co., Ltd.
Show me the shareholder structure of BYD Company Limited
Query intellectual property info of Tencent Technology (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.
Check if Alibaba Group has any legal risks
